title: Animal invaders (brainrot)
description: Adding best brainrot animals natively into Minecraft!
body:
![StartImage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dcbf7a7517fc7c2eb80bab61d94314ffe6e8e330.gif)

### Brr Brr Patapim
Potapimmo stalks forests and plains as a 2.7-block-tall behemoth with massive health and knockback, becoming relentlessly aggressive when harmed and forcing careful engagement or clever kiting to survive its onslaught.

![Brr Brr Patapim in wild](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6a009ed4ad5917676c99c0bb6252393ab9026cd.gif)

### Bobrito Bandito & Leader
Groups of Bobrito Banditos wield ranged attacks to harass adventurers, while the larger, tougher Bandito Leader coordinates assaults and buffs nearby minions—clearing their camps requires crowd-control tactics and precise timing.

![Banditto Bobritto in wild](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c867dbf24ab8abdd4ecafa4ff4c0c9d7ad7ee8c.gif)

### Lirili Larila
In desert biomes, the skittish Lirili Larila freezes and burrows at the first sign of danger, offering a unique stealth encounter that rewards players who spot its telltale shadows before it disappears.

![Lirili Larila in wild](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/037d1b4f1c598a85ee1533d9a50d49453fa3b256.gif)

### Tralalero Tralala
Patrolling shores and shallow waters, Tralalero Tralala uses its finned limbs to launch surprise attacks from both land and sea, challenging you to adapt between swimming skirmishes and beachside duels.

![Tralalero Tralala in wild](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/32fdf204a33b9e325023383de68309f89f16a5cc.gif)

### Bobritto Settlements (Alpha)
Each settlement emerges randomly in any biome around a central Town Hall, with modest houses and barracks scattered within a 200-block radius; interiors are currently empty shells, with deeper layouts and NPC routines planned for future updates.

### Legendary Swords (Uncraftable)
Five mythical blades—Excalibur’s lightning strikes, Durandal’s blast waves, Festering Desire’s life-steal and invisibility, Gramr’s fire mastery, and the Goyda Slayer Axe’s raw power—offer distinct combat enhancements, though none can yet be forged in survival mode.

### Advancement Challenge
Locating or defeating all four primary swords unlocks a hidden advancement, driving exploration across varied terrains and rewarding mastery of the mod’s signature encounters.
